sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87941" key="prologe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προλογ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n87941.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προλογίζω</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg030:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:123" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.123</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
